hero.title: Power Reflection Filter
hero.description: This filter uses mirrored reflections and aura composition to give your subject a commanding, powerful presence. Ideal for social media clips like TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, product reveals, outfit edits, and action shots that need a bold, high-impact look.
hero.upload_instruction: Upload media to apply this template.
hero.image_prompt_before: A medium full-body shot of a confident person in a sleek, modern outfit, standing on a polished dark floor under soft but directional key light. The background is minimal and dark, with no reflections visible. Clean, professional portrait style, shot with a 50mm lens, shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, no special effects.
hero.image_prompt_after: The same person and scene as before, but now with a strong power reflection effect applied: a sharp mirror reflection appears directly below on the polished floor, doubling the silhouette and creating perfect vertical symmetry. A faint, shimmering aura of light outlines the figure, adding a feeling of authority and pressure. The lighting intensifies into a moody, high-contrast setup with cool tones and subtle lens flare. The overall feel is cinematic and commanding, suitable for social media hero content.

what_it_is.title: What makes a Power Reflection Filter video work?
what_it_is.intro: A precision mirror reflection splits the frame, doubling the subject while an aura-like composition amplifies authority and pressure. Strong front-facing lighting, clean lines, and a commanding central presence transform an ordinary clip into a visually dominant moment that demands attention.

cards.title: Clean, centered starting frame
cards.description: Begin with a well-lit, front-facing subject against an uncluttered background. A centered composition and strong contrast let the mirror effect align precisely and maximize visual impact.

cards.title: Composed, direct subject posture
cards.description: Hold a steady stance with minimal movement and direct eye contact. The duplication reinforces a sense of control and quiet dominance without needing exaggerated gestures.

cards.title: Symmetrical reflection split
cards.description: A vertical or horizontal mirror line doubles the figure, often with a subtle drift or light bloom. This layered duplication creates an imposing, confrontational visual that feels almost architectural.

cards.title: Scroll-stopping social presence
cards.description: The bold symmetry and authoritative mood naturally halt the feed. Ideal for personal branding, thought leadership snippets, product reveals, or ad hooks that need instant credibility and weight.

application_scenarios.title: Application Scenarios
application_scenarios.description: Explore real-world creative applications of the Power Reflection Filter across different content channels.

scenarios.title: Executive Leadership Portraits
scenarios.description: Command authority in boardroom-ready headshots with mirrored reflections that double the impact.
scenarios.image_prompt: A high-end corporate portrait of a CEO standing in a sleek office, polished floor reflecting a perfect mirror image of the person, creating a symmetrical composition. The person wears a dark suit, confident expression, arms crossed. Lighting is dramatic spotlight effect, enhancing a sense of power. Background slightly blurred. Realistic photo.

scenarios.title: Cinematic Character Showcase
scenarios.description: Create movie poster-style images that radiate dominance with mirrored reflections and intense poses.
scenarios.image_prompt: A dramatic low-angle shot of an actor in a long coat on a wet city street at night, perfect reflection in a puddle doubling the figure. Stern expression, powerful stance. Neon lights reflecting in the water. Symmetrical composition, atmospheric tension, cinematic color grading.

scenarios.title: Stage Authority Shots
scenarios.description: Captivate audiences with speaker portraits that mirror your presence and amplify your influence.
scenarios.image_prompt: A motivational speaker on a dark stage, low-angle shot, glossy stage floor reflecting a perfect mirror image. The speaker gestures outward with commanding presence, spotlights behind creating a silhouette effect with reflected light. Symmetrical composition, sense of grandeur and power. Realistic, high-contrast photography.

faqs.question: What is the Power Reflection Filter effect?
faqs.answer: The Power Reflection Filter creates a mirrored reflection of your subject and adjusts the composition to strengthen a sense of authority and presence. It works on both photos and short videos.

faqs.question: Why is the Power Reflection Filter useful for TikTok, Reels, or Shorts?
faqs.answer: It quickly adds a dramatic, high-impact look that helps your content stand out in a fast-scrolling feed. The vertical mirror composition fits short-form formats and holds viewer attention right away.

faqs.question: Can I apply the Power Reflection Filter to a single uploaded image?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upload one image or video clip, and the tool will detect the main subject and generate the mirrored effect automatically. No manual editing is needed.

faqs.question: What kind of image or video works best with the Power Reflection Filter?
faqs.answer: Images or clips with a clear main subject, simple backgrounds, and good contrast produce the most natural-looking reflection. Subjects with strong vertical lines, such as a person standing upright, often work particularly well.

faqs.question: Can I use the Power Reflection Filter for product, fashion, travel, or creator content?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. It adds a clean, mirror-like presentation to products, enhances the sense of presence in fashion shots, creates dramatic symmetry for travel scenes, and gives a bold visual style to creator content.

cta.headline: Add a bold reflection effect to your images
cta.supporting_text: Start from a prompt, upload your own media, or customize a template.

other_names.title: Other names for Power Reflection Filter
other_names.description: Users may describe the Power Reflection Filter with different names or search terms, such as intense reflection overlay, glossy shine effect, or dynamic reflective glow. Whether you call it a mirror reflection filter, an energy glare effect, or a powerful light reflection, LazyKiwi helps turn these ideas into stunning short-video-ready visuals with ease.
